title: ReportEvent
description: Canonical wire form of the engine observability event surface (AC-O-1 / AC-O-3). One ReportEvent flows through each `onParseEvent`, `onValidate`, or `onTransform` callback. The `channel` discriminator picks exactly one of the `parse`, `validate`, or `transform` payloads. `byteOffset` is the AC-P-3 canonical source coordinate, omitted from the wire when the emitting layer has no source location for the event.

sequence.description: Dense, monotonic event sequence across every channel (AC-O-3).

channel.description: Discriminator. Exactly one of `parse` / `validate` / `transform` MUST be present and MUST match this value.

byteOffset.description: AC-P-3 canonical source coordinate. Omitted when the emitting layer has no source location. Always present on parse-channel events; present on validate-channel events whose underlying Diagnostic carries a location.

kind.description: Stable lowercase token drawn from `ParseEventKind`. New kinds are additive only.

name.description: Lexical name when the event names one (open_scope, close_scope, name, mode_switch's content type, processing_instruction target).

value.description: Stringified scalar value when the event carries one (value events, processing-instruction data).

transform.description: TransformKind discriminator from the source-map model (e.g. `CemTokenizer`, `EventNormalizer`, `CemAstBuilder`). Names follow the Rust enum variants.

summary.description: Free-form human-readable phase summary; not load-bearing for routing.

SourceMapStack.description: Origin-first stack of `SourceMapFrame` records (AC-P-7). The last frame is the current emission's frame. Frame structure is opaque to this schema — consumers that need its fields read `SourceMapFrame` from the Rust crate or its companion schema.
